evidence: standards/enterprise/swiftui-production.md and the final joined AI consistency review
exception_policy: View-local state is allowed only for transient UX or geometry mechanics that do not create product meaning and require no business-layer test.
statement: A SwiftUI View MUST NOT own business state or dependencies, format raw or domain values, or derive eligibility, status, error, analytics, CTA, or other product-facing meaning.
